description: Response schema for product-user-focus-group ask mode. Each synthetic instance returns this object.

response.description: Full narrative response to the research question, written in first person as the persona

themes.description: 1–5 short theme labels extracted from the response (e.g. 'trust through transparency', 'fear of lock-in')

verbatim.description: A single representative quote (1–2 sentences) that best captures this instance's perspective

confidence.description: Self-assessed confidence: high if the persona archetype has strong prior context for this question, low if speculative
